description: Continuity state for this market (discovery mode). Source of truth for NEW vs ONGOING classification. Updated weekly. 'since' = real-world date of the underlying move; 'first_seen_week' = first week WE tracked it; 'weeks_seen' = every week the signal re-appeared.

status_legend.ESCALATING: previously tracked + a new development this week
status_legend.ONGOING: still visible, no new development (report compactly with week count)
status_legend.RESOLVED: concluded or not seen for 4+ weeks, archived
